reasoning: The current observation shows that when mass is 10 kg, acceleration is 2 m/s², and force is 20 N. I hypothesize that the force acting on an object is directly proportional to its mass and acceleration. To test this, I will first increase the mass and observe the effect on force while keeping acceleration constant.

The current observation shows that when mass is increased from 10 kg to 20 kg while keeping acceleration constant at 2 m/s², the force increases from 20 N to 40 N. This supports my hypothesis that force is directly proportional to both mass and acceleration. Next, I should test if decreasing the mass while keeping acceleration constant affects the force.
